title: Principal Frontend Developer at Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
